title: Localization round 3: hunt remaining hardcoded English strings (board-flagged)
description: ## Context The board rejected merging the localization branch on [ZAI-138](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-138). They confirmed there is still hardcoded English text visible in the UI when language=Russian. **Do not merge `vib-1171-2652-2760-3582-localization` until this is fixed and re-verified.** ## Concrete English strings the board flagged Collected from board screenshots posted on [ZAI-10](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-10) (comments dated 2026-05-06 and 2026-05-07). Use these as **starting points** — the board says they see more, so a full audit is required. ### Dashboard (`/:companyKey/dashboard`) - **`Agents`** — section heading on the dashboard agent panel (should be `Агенты`). - **`Finished 1d ago`** — agent run status label inside agent card (status word + relative time). - **`Critical` / `High` / `Medium` / `Low`** — chart legend labels for "Задачи по приоритету". - **`In Review`** — status label inside "Задачи по статусу" chart legend. - Activity feed event lines, including: - `Boardissue read marked SDF-1—...` → `issue read marked` is English. - `Boardinstance settings general updated` → `instance settings general updated` is English. - `CEOenvironment lease released` → `environment lease released` is English. - `CEOcommented on SDF-1—...` → `commented on` is English. ### Issue properties (`/:companyKey/issues/:identifier`) - **`Properties`** — section heading (should be `Свойства`). - **`Medium`** (priority value) — display label in the Priority property. - **`May 6, 2026`** — date format using English month names (need locale-aware date formatter). - **`1d ago`** — relative time string (need locale-aware formatter). ### Inbox filters dropdown (`/:companyKey/inbox/mine`) - Quick-filter pills: **`All` / `Active` / `Backlog` / `Done`**. - Status column checkboxes: **`In Progress` / `Todo` / `Backlog` / `In Review` / `Blocked` / `Done` / `Cancelled`**. - Visibility column: **`Live runs only`** checkbox label. - Creator search dropdown contains `access_roles.board` — looks like a raw i18n key bleeding through (translation key, not display label). ### Account / header - Agent name rendered as `ceo` (lowercase) inside `ceo` — likely a separate display-name/casing concern rather than i18n, but verify. ## Acceptance criteria 1. All strings listed above render in Russian when `i18n.language=ru`. 2. **Date and relative-time formatters** are locale-aware across all 8 supported locales — not just translated strings (so `1d ago` becomes `1 день назад` in ru, etc.). 3. **Status / priority enums** render via `t()` everywhere they appear (charts, filters, properties, badges) — not via raw enum string interpolation. 4. **Activity feed event templates** render via i18n — there are likely many more event types than the four flagged; audit the full set. 5. A fresh Browser Tester sweep across all 8 locales finds **zero** English text on dashboard, issue detail, inbox, costs, activity, agents, settings, and command palette — submit screenshot evidence per locale. 6. Translation keys exist in **all 8 locale files** (en, ru, de, es, fr, it, pt, zh) with native translations — no English fallbacks for non-en locales. ## Suggested approach 1. **Grep audit first.** Search the UI source for hardcoded user-visible English strings (status enums like `In Progress`, `Todo`, `Backlog`, `Cancelled`; common words like `Finished`, `Properties`, `Critical`, `High`, `Medium`, `Low`, `All`, `Active`, `Done`, `ago`, etc.). Many will be in renderers/formatters, not just JSX literals. 2. Use grep to find string-typed enum displays — e.g. constants tables that map enum values to English labels. 3. Verify date/time formatting uses i18next-aware libraries (e.g. `date-fns/locale`, `Intl.DateTimeFormat` keyed on `i18n.language`, or `react-i18next` formatters). 4. Once strings are wired, hand to Browser Tester (a6ec4085-a4e5-489c-bd10-7c46f8b62e07) for cross-locale screenshot sweep before requesting CEO review. ## Coordination - Route implementation to **Localization Agent** (2c35ae09-781d-4a7c-880b-8abd833fd682) for translation/wiring work. - Route cross-locale verification to **Browser Tester Agent** (a6ec4085-a4e5-489c-bd10-7c46f8b62e07). - CTO owns the rollup; split into bounded child issues per surface (dashboard, issue properties, inbox filters, activity feed, formatters) using `paperclip-converting-plans-to-tasks`. - **Do not request merge of the branch** until acceptance criteria all pass and CEO approves. ZAI-10 stays in `in_review`.

issue.title: Complete the localization project to completion
